languages.text: "Я увере{mf|н|на}, это поможет разрушить временную ловушку".
"I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."
languages.original_text: "Я увере{mf|н|на}, это поможет разрушить временную ловушку".

traits.locale_text: "I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."
"I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."
"I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."

languages.text: “我很确定，这能帮我们毁掉这个时间陷阱。”
languages.original_text: "I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."

traits.locale_text: “我很确定，这能帮我们毁掉这个时间陷阱。”

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|certain|certaine} que cela permettra de détruire le piège temporel. »
languages.original_text: "I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|certain|certaine} que cela permettra de détruire le piège temporel. »

languages.text: "Bu şekilde zaman tuzağının yok edilebileceğine eminim."
languages.original_text: "I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."

traits.locale_text: "Bu şekilde zaman tuzağının yok edilebileceğine eminim."

languages.text: «Estoy convencid{mf|o|a} de que esto ayudará a destruir la trampa temporal».
languages.original_text: "I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy convencid{mf|o|a} de que esto ayudará a destruir la trampa temporal».

languages.text: "Ich bin sicher, das wird helfen, die Zeitfalle zu zerstören."
languages.original_text: "I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin sicher, das wird helfen, die Zeitfalle zu zerstören."

languages.text: 「このことが、時間トラップを破壊するのに役立つと確信している」
languages.original_text: "I am certain that this will help destroy the time trap."

traits.locale_text: 「このことが、時間トラップを破壊するのに役立つと確信している」
